hero.title: We help companies stabilize operations before problems become crises.
hero.subtitle: We step into organizations five minutes before midnight - restructuring teams, setting up processes, and restoring functional collaboration. With respect for people and business.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: We hold a vision of the world where the fusion of technical mastery and essential soft skills shapes the core of premier tech companies.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: We provide tailored solutions and tools that enhance efficiency, empower individuals, and foster team growth, kickstarting a self-driven process for resolving company challenges with sustainable effect.

why.title: Why Companies Choose HumanSoft.IT
why.description: When a company grows, pressure on people, processes, and leadership multiplies. What used to work is no longer enough - chaos grows, competencies become unclear, and teams get exhausted.
why.conclusion: We help turn these situations into opportunities for change and stabilization.

services.title: What We Do
services.quote: Our goal is not to deliver a document. Our goal is a company that actually works.

restructuring.title: Organization and Team Restructuring
items: mapping current state, roles, and responsibilities
identifying weak points and duplicities
designing new structure and decision lines
accompanying implementation of changes

processes.title: Process and Operations Setup
items: workflow and communication standardization
clearly defined competencies and responsibilities
process and operational stabilization
preventing errors and operational conflicts

leadership.title: Leadership and Team Development
items: working with managers and key people
strengthening self-driven approach in teams
collaboration culture instead of firefighting

servicesPage.title: What We Do
servicesPage.intro1: We help companies set up operations to be more stable, transparent, and ready for growth. We connect people, processes, roles, and systems, and turn changes into practice so they don't just stay on paper.
servicesPage.intro2: We don't just address symptoms. We look at the real causes of inefficiency, overload, chaos, or unclear management and propose steps that bring real progress.

restructuring.title: Organization & Team Restructuring
restructuring.description: When a company grows, changes, or hits internal limits, the original setup often stops working. We help straighten the company structure to match reality, support decision-making, and not slow down performance.
items: mapping the current state, roles, and responsibilities
identifying weaknesses, overlaps, and duplicities
designing a new organizational structure
setting up decision lines and competencies
support during implementation of changes into daily practice
restructuring.result: clearer operations, less dependency on individuals, faster decision-making, and better management of teams and the entire company

processes.title: Setting Up Processes & Company Operations
processes.description: Many companies don't grow because they lack capable people, but because their daily operations rely on improvisation. We help companies name, map, and set up processes to be clear, functional, and sustainable.
items: mapping and analysis of existing processes
workflow and communication standardization
clear definition of competencies and responsibilities
process and operational stabilization
identifying inefficient steps, blind spots, and operational collisions
proposing adjustments to ease daily operations
processes.result: less chaos, fewer errors, better continuity between teams, and greater confidence that the company works even without constant firefighting

leadership.title: Leadership Development & Team Collaboration
leadership.description: Even the best processes don't work without people who can carry and develop them. That's why we also look at managers, key roles, and collaboration within the company. We help build an environment where people take responsibility, collaborate, and handle change without unnecessary resistance.
items: working with managers and key people
leadership support during periods of change
strengthening autonomy and self-driven approach in teams
improving collaboration between roles and departments
supporting a culture of collaboration instead of firefighting
long-term anchoring of change into company practice
leadership.result: stronger leadership, more autonomous teams, better communication, and changes that last even after the collaboration ends

process.title: How Our Collaboration Works
process.subtitle: Every company is different, but our approach always has a clear framework.

steps.title: Understanding the Situation
steps.description: First, we look at what the company is really dealing with, where the main barriers are, and what result the collaboration should bring.

steps.title: Analysis & Reality Mapping
steps.description: We work with interviews, process mapping, practice observation, and data. We're not interested in how things should work, but how they actually work.

steps.title: Solution & Priority Design
steps.description: We prepare specific recommendations, a structure of changes, and clear next steps.

steps.title: Implementation Support
steps.description: We help not only design the change, but also implement it, communicate it, and maintain it in real operations.

why.title: Why Companies Work With Us
items: we connect business, processes, people, and systems
we go after the real cause of problems, not just their symptoms
we can combine a strategic view with practical implementation
we don't stop at recommendations — we help turn change into reality
we build solutions tailored to each specific company, not from a universal template

servicesPage.claim: Our goal is not to deliver a document. Our goal is a company that truly works.
servicesPage.ctaText: Want to find out where your company has the most room for improvement? Let's schedule an introductory consultation and look at it together.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A closed cycle of change that repeats and deepens.

step1.title: Initial Probe
step1.description: We enter the company, map the terrain, and listen.

step2.title: Deep Analysis
step2.description: We uncover the true state of affairs and name key challenges.

step3.title: Pilot Project
step3.description: We verify the proposed solution in practice on a smaller scale.

step4.title: Implementation of Changes
step4.description: We roll out changes fully with team involvement.

step5.title: Evaluation
step5.description: We measure impact, process feedback, and prepare the next cycle.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: We are change partners - not external auditors. We do not come to companies from above. We work with people, listen to context, and together with teams find solutions that make sense in practice.

member2.name: Pavel Vřesňák
member2.shortBio: I'm a natural leader with years of executive management experience, mainly in technology and IT. I combine a deep technical foundation with business thinking and sensitivity for working with people. I help companies read their reality, name the true causes of difficulties, and find solutions that make sense both strategically and humanly.
member2.bio:
Pavel Vřesňák is a natural leader with extensive experience in executive management, primarily in technology and IT. His focus is on long-term personal and organizational development.

From childhood, he was passionate about programming, and his professional path formally continued with studies at VUT FIT. However, right after graduation, instead of a purely technical career, he chose the path of entrepreneurship, people leadership, and company management. It is precisely the combination of a deep technical foundation, business thinking, and sensitivity for working with people that forms the distinctive framework of his specialization.

He further expanded his education at the Institute of Applied Psychology and Essential College. Throughout his career, he has led, developed, or stabilized companies and teams of various sizes – from smaller companies to divisions of larger Czech and international organizations. His primary domain is executive management, especially the CEO role, both in long-term and interim capacities. He also focuses on strategic consulting, particularly in the technology and IT segment.

In his work, he relies on the ability to quickly orient himself in complex situations, perceive connections across the company, and get to the core of the problem without unnecessary fluff. He helps clients read the reality of their organization more accurately, name the true causes of difficulties, and find solutions that make sense not only strategically but also humanly and operationally. His approach combines analytical depth, practical perspective, and the ability to translate complex matters into understandable and actionable steps.

His style is characteristically natural and straightforward. He values substance, trust, and real impact over formalities. This is why his way of collaboration is often perceived by clients as very human, factual, and authentic.

Beyond strategic and executive management, he has long been dedicated to developing managers and leadership at an individual level. The opportunity to support people in their growth – from corporate managers to small business owners to his own sons – is what he considers the most important and fulfilling part of his work and life mission. Positive psychology applied in leadership is a natural part of both his professional approach and personal conviction.

member4.name: Milan Košdy
member4.shortBio: I'm a consultant, trainer, coach, and psychologist. I combine psychological insight with management practice, helping companies improve people leadership, HR processes, and change management. I work with 360° feedback and assessments – always focused on real impact.
member4.bio:
I have over 20 years of experience in people and organizational development. I studied psychology at FSS MU and spent more than 15 years in managerial roles at multinational corporations and local companies. I combine psychological insight with top management practice, helping companies advance leadership, collaboration, and performance without unnecessary 'theories for the drawer'.

I most often work in HR and change management: setting up management systems, HR processes, compensation, recruitment, and onboarding. I use Assessment & Development Centers, psychodiagnostics, and 360° feedback – always aiming for clear conclusions and concrete steps actionable for both leadership and the team. I focus on developing managerial competencies, setting accountability, building a culture of collaboration, and healthy team communication.

My priority is that change is understandable, human, and measurable in results of people and the entire company – and that new ways of working are truly lived in everyday practice.

member5.name: František Fiala
member5.shortBio: I'm a process and systems consultant. I help companies set up their way of working so it's clear who does what, why, and how it flows – without unnecessary bureaucracy. I model processes, clarify roles, and most importantly implement changes in practice, tool-independently.
member5.bio:
I help turn good decisions into reality. I give companies a clear work system: who does what, why they do it, and how work actually flows – without unnecessary complexity or 'paper-only' processes. I'm tool-independent: I set up ways of working that fit your environment and feel natural to your people.

I bring experience across roles and environments – from manual testing in software development, through sales, marketing and customer care, to project management and creating documentation people actually use. This lets me quickly understand a company's situation and translate it into concrete steps. I typically deliver process modeling and descriptions, role clarification, improvement proposals, and most importantly their implementation in practice.

I don't do 'processes for processes' sake' – I always focus on what helps the company most: speed, quality, overview, or team peace. My principle is simple: the system should be so comfortable nobody has to think about it – yet everyone understands why it all makes sense for the company.

member6.name: Veronika Hegrová
member6.shortBio: I'm a sales and sales systems consultant. I teach how to sell without pressure: the right questions, clear communication, and win-win outcomes. I also do sales analysis – I show where sales grind and propose changes to grow results.
member6.bio:
I'm a consultant for sales and sales systems. I believe in a simple but 'dangerous' thing: when you truly hear your customer, selling becomes much easier. I teach teams and individuals how to ask the right questions, communicate without pressure, and guide a sales conversation to a clear win-win outcome. Practically and with respect for your style. I don't go the ego route or a rehearsed 'show'; I start with customer needs and help turn them into a concrete offer and next step.

Because I love numbers, I also look at sales analytically. I do business analysis, map your current process, and identify where things unnecessarily grind, where opportunities leak, and why some leads don't convert. Then I propose simple changes in communication, meeting structure, pipeline management, CRM habits, and measurement – so results grow, not just 'good feelings'.

My goal is for the customer to leave with certainty that they got the best – and that they want to come back.

member7.name: Monika Kunešová
member7.shortBio: I'm a psychologist specializing in work psychology. I focus on managerial development, corporate strategy, and employee experience research. I love sparking the appetite for change in my clients and working with people who are willing to grow.
member7.bio: Monika is a psychologist specializing in work psychology. In addition to her mentoring role on Expert Board 21, she serves as managing director of Emplores s.r.o. She specializes in managerial development, corporate strategy, and employee experience research. She has many years of experience designing and delivering programs for managerial skills development. She loves sparking the appetite for change in her clients. She enjoys working with people who are willing to grow and continuously work on themselves.

contact.title: Want Change Before It Is Too Late?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch - we will review your situation and suggest next steps.

evaluation.title: Evaluate Your Company
evaluation.subtitle: A short questionnaire will show you how your company truly stands — in management, processes, and team collaboration. Get a clear picture of what works and where opportunities for improvement are hiding.
benefits: Spot weak points before they become real problems
Get an independent view of how your company operates
Receive concrete ideas on where to start making changes
It only takes a few minutes — and it could change the direction of your entire company

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights and experiences from company transformation practice.

references.title: References & Case Studies
references.subtitle: Stories of companies we have helped.

caseA.title: Reference A (anonymous)
approach: Detailed view of the situation + specific steps with impact
result: Clearer direction, naming of blockers
More open discussions at management meetings, more practical outcomes
Analysis as a document they will return to long-term
caseA.quote: Spolupráce s HumanSoft.it nám velmi pomohla. Dokázali propojit detailní pohled na naši situaci s konkrétními kroky, které mají dopad. Díky jejich práci jsme si uvědomili, kde nás něco brzdilo, a nastavili jsme jasnější směr, kam jít dál. Velký přínos pro nás mělo i to, že nás naučili lépe vést porady vedení – diskuse byly otevřenější a výsledky mnohem praktičtější. Úvodní analýzu, kterou připravili, bereme jako dokument, ke kterému se budeme dlouhodobě vracet.

caseB.title: Reference B (anonymous)
result: Team functioning improvement
Greater independence and maturity of key managers
More precise planning, measurability, fewer conflicts
Efficiency and accountability of managers (including business perception through results)
caseB.quote: Spolupráce s HumanSoft.it nám pomohla zásadně posunout fungování týmu. Klíčoví manažeři se rozvinuli směrem k větší samostatnosti a zralosti. Nově nastavený delivery proces přinesl přesnější plánování, měřitelnost a méně konfliktů při dodávkách. Revize organizační struktury a jasnější vymezení rolí zlepšily efektivitu a posílily odpovědnost manažerů, především v oblasti ekonomického (businessového) vnímání firmy přes výsledky.

caseC.title: Reference C (anonymous)
caseC.situation: Gaps in company operations and management
approach: Personal mentoring of selected key people
result: Visible impact on daily team operations
Improved internal communication and collaboration
Better overview of project economics
caseC.quote: HumanSoft.it nám pomohl jasně identifikovat, kde máme mezery ve fungování a řízení naší firmy, a navrhl drobné změny, které měly rychlý a viditelný dopad na každodenní chod týmu. Výrazně se zlepšila komunikace a spolupráce uvnitř firmy. Současně jsme díky jejich přístupu získali lepší přehled o ekonomice našich projektů. A to vše při velmi osobní a lidské spolupráci včetně osobního mentoringu vybraných klíčových lidí ve firmě.

caseD.title: Reference D (anonymous)
caseD.situation: Need for clearer, faster and more modern communication
approach: Simple rules for email, chat and calendars
Extended use of corporate calendar features
result: Smooth transition to new tool without confusion
Strengthened team dynamics
More efficient calendar management
caseD.quote: Potřebovali jsme do týmu zavést přehlednější, rychlejší a modernější způsob komunikace. Díky profesionálnímu vedení Franty při zaváděn MS Teams do firmy se nám podařilo nejen posílit týmovou dynamiku, ale také hladce zvládnout přechod na nový nástroj – bez zmatků a nejistoty. Velkou roli v tom sehrála i jasně nastavená, ale jednoduchá pravidla pro používání e-mailu, chatu a kalendářů. Kalendáře jsme ve firmě už dříve využívali, ale díky Frantovým podnětům jsme začali objevovat a naplno využívat širší škálu funkcí, které nabízejí.

caseE.title: Reference E (anonymous)
approach: Changing the approach to timesheets and implementing them in practice
result: Daily work reporting became standard
Resistance almost disappeared
caseE.quote: Timesheety byly v naší firmě odjakživa sprosté slovo. Nikdo neměl chuť je řešit. A potom se objevil Franta. Během několika měsíců se celé téma obrátilo o 180 stupňů. Nyní je v naší firmě úplně normální vykazovat svou každodenní práci a nikdo s tím nemá minimální problém.

caseF.title: Reference F (anonymous)
caseF.situation: Need for more order, personal disputes slowing the team, 'garage style'
approach: Refining work system for key people
result: Disputes calmed down
Shift to professional level
Readiness for larger projects
caseF.quote: Spolupráce s HumanSoft.it nám pomohla dát větší řád do fungování firmy. Díky jejich vedení jsme upřesnili systém práce pro klíčové lidi, což uklidnilo i osobní spory, které nás brzdily. Tým se naučil postavit celý proces dodávky a firma se posunula z garážového stylu na profesionální úroveň, připravenou na větší projekty.

caseG.title: Reference G (anonymous)
approach: Long-term coaching and mentoring of key people
result: Team progress in practice (not just theory)
Notable leadership improvement of key people
Impact on daily work and results
caseG.quote: Spolupráce s HumanSoft.it nebyla jen o teorii, ale o praktických změnách. Workshopy nám pomohly posunout tým, naučili jsme se lépe řídit vývoj a naši klíčoví lidé se v leadershipu díky dlouhodobého coachingu a mentoringu znatelně zvedli. Dnes je vidět, že se to promítá do každodenní práce i výsledků.

caseH.title: Reference H (anonymous, SK)
caseH.situation: Important period, need for project stabilization and transparency
approach: Setting projects for real economic results
Strengthening internal processes and client communication
result: Higher satisfaction on both sides (company and clients)
Deepened partner relationships
More stable company ready for growth and vision
caseH.quote: HumanSoft.it pre nás zohral kľúčovú úlohu v dôležitom období. Spoločne sme spriehľadnili a stabilizovali projekty, nastavili ich tak, aby prinášali reálne ekonomické výsledky, a zároveň sme posilnili interné procesy a komunikáciu s klientmi. Tým sa zvýšila spokojnosť na oboch stranách a prehĺbili sa partnerské vzťahy. Súčasne sa nám podarilo naštartovať ďalší rozvoj manažmentu po osobnej aj profesnej stránke, odhaliť skryté možnosti a potenciál ľudí. Výsledkom je stabilnejšia firma pripravená na ďalší rast a realizáciu našej vízie.

caseI.title: Reference I (anonymous)
caseI.situation: Unclear roles and frequent conflicts, friction between sales and delivery, missing HR and operations team
result: Fundamental order in management
Fewer conflicts
Ability to hire key people who moved the company forward
caseI.quote: HumanSoft.it nám pomohl udělat zásadní pořádek v řízení firmy. Tam, kde byla dříve nejasnost a časté konflikty, jsme nastavili jasné role. Podařilo se zlepšit vztahy mezi obchodem a delivery a vybudovat funkční HR i operations tým. Díky tomu jsme mohli přijmout klíčové lidi, kteří firmu posunuli dál.

caseJ.title: Reference J (anonymous)
caseJ.situation: Need to streamline internal processes and systematic project and service management
approach: Expert guidance, quick orientation in the issue
Constructive collaboration with focus on results
result: Streamlined communication and processes
Clearer project and task management system
Recommending the service to other companies
caseJ.quote: Na začátku jsme řešili potřebu zefektivnit interní procesy a zlepšit systémové řízení v oblasti projektů a servisu. Od spolupráce jsme očekávali především odborné vedení, praktické návrhy a reálné výsledky. Na spolupráci s týmem Humansoft.it oceňujeme především profesionální přístup, schopnost rychle se zorientovat v problematice a praktické návrhy, které mají okamžitý dopad. Spolupráce probíhala vždy konstruktivně a s důrazem na konkrétní výsledky. Přínosem pro nás bylo nejen zefektivnění komunikace a procesů, ale i jasnější systém řízení projektů a úkolů. Služby bychom rozhodně doporučili dalším firmám, které hledají spolehlivého partnera pro rozvoj a optimalizaci firemních procesů.
